title: Quark-less Glint
description: A simple resource pack that makes Quark's Colored Glint less intrussive
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/8Peakc6.png 'Banner')

### What is Quark-Less Glint?

Quark's Colored Glint can be a bit intrussive since you cannot see the texture beneath. That's why I created this texture pack that reduces a bit the glint so you can see both. This does not cange anything else but the intensity of the glint, everything else is the same.

### Showcase

Note: it's very dificult to see in a simple image, but you can appreciate the diferente. So much close to the vanilla one, but with a colored tint!

![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/JELb46M.png 'showcase')

### Installation

Use Modrinth App for a one click installation or follow the steps:

- Download the fille.
- Drop it inside your resourcepacks folder.
- Enable the Quark-less Glint inside your game.
- Enjoy!

### It's me, hi

All my social media can be found here: [Danymaddox](https://linktr.ee/Danymaddox).
